productDisplayName: Fila Men Black Top Fuel Sports Shoes
description: Style noteCrafted from Italy's materials capital Biella, this fila shoe promises a smooth ride and optimal durability. fila fanboys know the comfort that this brand provides - do you need more reasons to buy the DLS Top Fuel. Product DetailsRound toed black and neon green shoe with central lace-ups and mesh overlaysHeavily padded mesh inner, tongue and collarFoamy rubber midsole upraised with a dynamic landing system at the heelAggressive TPU outsole with flex grooves and patterned lugsMaterial and CareSynthetic, meshDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
